name: taobao-invoice-helper
description: 基于 Playwright 的淘宝/天猫订单发票规划、申请、换开与下载辅助脚本

scripts.test:classifier: node test-rejection-classifier.js && node test-error-classifier.js && node test-chat-reply-classifier.js
scripts.test:syntax: node --check invoice-actions.js && node --check error-classifier.js && node --check order-state-machine.js && node --check invoice-audit-report.js && node --check test-rejection-classifier.js && node --check test-error-classifier.js && node --check test-chat-reply-classifier.js && node --check repair-paper-invoices.js && node --check repair-pending-invoices.js && node --check debug-order-list.js && node --check debug-invoice-form.js && node --check archive/check-invoices-detail-recoverable.js
